message:
🌱 Add keda: Add option for the Datadog scaler to use the Datadog mission (#1238)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "keda-5355-add-option-for-the-datadog-scaler-to-use-the-datadog-cluster-agent-as-",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "keda: Add option for the Datadog scaler to use the Datadog Cluster Agent as source of metrics",
+    "description": "Add option for the Datadog scaler to use the Datadog Cluster Agent as source of metrics. Requested by 13+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current keda deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your keda version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda\nhelm list -n keda 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working keda installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review keda configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant keda configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda\nkubectl get configmap -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=keda\n```\n### Proposal\n\nRight now, the Datadog scaler polls the Datadog REST API to get the query values that will drive scaling events."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Add option for the Datadog scaler to use the Datadog…",
+        "description": "Add option to the Datadog scaler to use the Datadog Cluster Agent as proxy to obtain the metrics, instead of calling the REST API directly.\n\nThis avoids duplication and also improves the rate limiting issue that the Datadog scaler currently has, as the Cluster Agent gets the metric values in batches.\n\nImplements: #5355\n- [X] A PR is opened to update the documentation on ([repo](https://github.com/kedacore/keda-docs)) *(if applicable)*\n- [X] Commits are signed with Developer Certificate of\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda\nkubectl get events -n keda --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Add option for the Datadog scaler to use the Datadog…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Add option to the Datadog scaler to use the Datadog Cluster Agent as proxy to obtain the metrics, instead of calling the REST API directly.\n\nThis avoids duplication and also improves the rate limiting issue that the Datadog scaler currently has, as the Cluster Agent gets the metric values in batches.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
